test_cases.title: Task is saved with no assignee when the assignee field is left blank
steps: Navigate to the create task page
test_cases.expected_result: The task is saved successfully with an unassigned state; no assignee is shown

test_cases.title: Unassigned task is visible in the team unassigned task view
preconditions: An unassigned task has been created in the project
steps: Navigate to the team unassigned view
test_cases.expected_result: The task appears in the unassigned view with its title and unassigned state visible

test_cases.title: An assignee can be added to an unassigned task at any later time
preconditions: An unassigned task exists in the project
steps: Click the assignee field and select a team member
test_cases.expected_result: The task is updated with the chosen assignee; it no longer appears in the unassigned view

notes: Covers optional-assignee creation, unassigned visibility, and late-assignment scenarios as specified.
